title: About us
who_are_we_text_1: Hello! We are very happy that you are using Aristomate, an app made by students for students!
who_are_we_text_3: have realized that in the chaos of a student's daily life, a 'digital friend' that consolidates the academic experience into a single point is useful for their survival.
mission_text: Our goal is to facilitate university students both in their faster information on courses and progress as well as in easier student 'survival'.
